leadText: The Crown Shrine (Japanese: カンムリ神殿 Crown Temple) is a location in the Galar region. It connects to the Path to the Peak to the south.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] Art of the Crown Tundra depicting the Crown Shrine The Crown Shrine is a large, castle-like structure that was built in honor of the "king of bountiful harvests" Calyrex at the top of the tallest mountain of the Crown Tundra . It consists of tall, stone walls surrounding a wide open courtyard, where leafless trees, including a giant one at its back, can be found growing. It also houses a small stable for Calyrex's steed, Glastrier / Spectrier .
